description_long: This is a large rectangular cardboard parcel, sealed with a wide strip of white packing tape running along its top and down the sides. The box is made from corrugated brown cardboard, featuring subtle horizontal lines and a few scattered dark stains, suggesting it has been handled or stored in a less-than-pristine environment. On one side, there are printed handling instructions, including a 'keep dry' symbol with an umbrella and the word 'fragile' accompanied by a glass icon, both in black ink. The top left corner of the box displays additional handling icons, indicating care in transport. The surface of the box is matte and slightly rough, typical of standard shipping cartons. The overall appearance is utilitarian, designed for shipping or storage in urban settings such as warehouses, sidewalks, or delivery areas.
description: A large brown cardboard shipping box sealed with white tape, featuring handling symbols and some visible stains. The box has a utilitarian, slightly worn appearance suitable for urban delivery or storage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white tape running vertically down the center and part of the top, with handling icons visible in the top left corner.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the plain cardboard surface with several dark stains and no visible tape or symbols.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displays the white tape running down the center and the word 'fragile' with a glass icon in the lower right corner.
description_view_3: Rear view features the 'keep dry' umbrella symbol and more scattered stains, with additional handling icons in the top right corner.
